title: gcc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[14.3.1-2.1]
- Update to latest pretty printers from GTS (RHEL-81976)

[14.3.1-2]
- update from releases/gcc-14 branch (RHEL-83953)
  - GCC 14.3 release
  - PRs ada/112958, ada/118712, ada/119265, c/100420, c/112556,
